name: ha
description: Command-free, skills + subagents plugin for building ONE feature thoroughly: deep plan (design dialogue) to approval, then implement with a per-task review loop plus a whole-diff adversarial review, an independent heavyweight PR review, rigorous feedback application, and a gated merge — with standalone conflict resolution and worktree cleanup. The thorough counterpart to sa; leverages the superpowers disciplines (required dependency). Model-agnostic.
